nodes.name: Fetch Signal For Outreach
nodes.notes: B.9c addition. Refetches the single highest-priority active signal for this lead's vertical at generation time. Graceful fallback: failure or empty result -> the Merge Signal Context node keeps the overlay prompt unchanged.

parameters.jsCode:
// CLX Outreach Generation v2 — Build Outreach Prompt (niche-aware) // Reads lead from Wait (preserves all fields). Reads niche overlay from previous HTTP. // Falls back to generic prompt when no overlay row is returned. const lead = $('Wait').item.json || {}; const rawOverlay = $input.item.json; let overlay = null; if (Array.isArray(rawOverlay) && rawOverlay.length > 0) { overlay = rawOverlay[0]; } else if (rawOverlay && typeof rawOverlay === 'object' && rawOverlay.claude_system_prompt) { overlay = rawOverlay; } let prompt; if (overlay && overlay.claude_system_prompt) { const sysPrompt = overlay.claude_system_prompt; const tone = overlay.outreach_tone || ''; const painSignals = Array.isArray(overlay.pain_signals) ? overlay.pain_signals : []; const offer = overlay.offer_mapping || {}; const primary = offer.primary_offer || {}; const foundingPrice = primary.founding_price || 1997; const targetOutcome = primary.target_outcome || '20-30 qualified prospect meetings per month'; const lines = [ sysPrompt, '', 'WRITING TONE:', tone, '', 'LEAD CONTEXT:', 'Name: ' + (lead.full_name || ''), 'Company: ' + (lead.company || ''), 'Job Title: ' + (lead.job_title || ''), 'City: ' + (lead.city || ''), 'Vertical: ' + (lead.vertical || lead.industry || ''), 'Research Summary: ' + (lead.research_summary || ''), 'Likely Business Need: ' + (lead.likely_business_need || ''), 'Research Angle: ' + (lead.research_angle || ''), 'Detected Signal: ' + (lead.detected_signal || ''), 'Growth Stage: ' + (lead.growth_stage || ''), 'Campaign: ' + (lead.campaign_name || ''), '', 'KNOWN PAIN SIGNALS FOR THIS VERTICAL (reference ONE that matches the lead naturally):', painSignals.map(function(p) { return '- ' + p; }).join('\n'), '', 'OFFER TO INCLUDE:', 'Founding client price: $' + foundingPrice + '/month locked for 12 months', 'Target outcome: ' + targetOutcome, 'Guarantee: 10 qualified discovery meetings within 60 days or money back', '', 'CALL TO ACTION:', 'Invite them to a 20-minute discovery call. Low commitment. No slide deck, no pressure.', '', 'EMAIL STRUCTURE (3 short paragraphs, peer-advisor voice, not SaaS-vendor voice):', 'P1: Specific observation from research (company, website, city). Name at least one detail that proves you looked.', 'P2: Connect the observation to one pain signal from the vertical list. Introduce the offer ($' + foundingPrice + '/mo founding, 12-month lock, 10-meeting guarantee) in one sentence, framed peer-to-peer.', 'P3: 20-minute discovery call invite. Low friction. Suggest this week or next.', '', 'STRICT RULES:', 'Never sound like a tech vendor. Write as a peer advisor who happens to build software.', 'Never use bullet points or dashes.', 'Use natural contractions. Short sentences. Conversational rhythm.', 'Maximum 140 words in email_body.', 'Do NOT include the subject line inside the HTML body.', 'Subject line: under 8 words, no trailing punctuation, industry-specific hook.', '', 'EMAIL BODY FORMAT (valid inline-styled HTML):', '
', '

[P1: research-specific observation]

', '

[P2: pain signal + offer + guarantee]

', '

[P3: 20-min discovery call ask]

', '

Best regards,
Mary Akintunde
Founder, Crystallux
info@crystallux.org | crystallux.org

', '
', '', 'Return ONLY raw JSON with no explanation no markdown no code blocks:', '{', ' "email_subject": "industry-specific hook under 8 words",', ' "email_body": "HTML email body using the template above",', ' "linkedin_message": "peer-advisor connection request under 250 characters",', ' "whatsapp_message": "casual peer message under 100 words",', ' "followup_message": "HTML follow up email referencing the first",', ' "outreach_angle": "one sentence describing the research hook and pain signal used",', ' "personalization_score": 8', '}' ]; prompt = lines.join('\n'); } else { const lines = [ 'You are an expert B2B sales copywriter. Your job is to write highly personalized outreach messages that feel genuinely human and researched.', '', 'CRITICAL WRITING RULES:', 'Write exactly like a real human professional would write.', 'Never use dashes hyphens or bullet points anywhere in any message.', 'Write in natural flowing sentences and paragraphs.', 'Write with natural contractions. Sound like a real person.', 'Sound warm and genuinely curious not salesy.', 'Read like a personal note not a marketing email.', 'The reader should feel like you know them personally.', 'Short sentences. Conversational rhythm. Real words.', '', 'Lead Intelligence:', 'Name: ' + (lead.full_name || ''), 'Company: ' + (lead.company || ''), 'Industry: ' + (lead.industry || ''), 'Job Title: ' + (lead.job_title || ''), 'City: ' + (lead.city || ''), 'Research Summary: ' + (lead.research_summary || ''), 'Likely Business Need: ' + (lead.likely_business_need || ''), 'Research Angle: ' + (lead.research_angle || ''), 'Campaign: ' + (lead.campaign_name || ''), 'Value Proposition: ' + (lead.campaign_value_proposition || ''), 'Pain Point: ' + (lead.campaign_pain_point || ''), 'Call To Action: ' + (lead.campaign_call_to_action || ''), 'Tone: ' + (lead.campaign_tone || ''), '', 'General rules:', 'Never use generic openers like I hope this finds you well.', 'Reference something specific about their company or industry.', 'Every message must feel like it was written specifically for this person.', 'End every message with a soft clear call to action.', 'Never mention Crystallux by name. Position as their solution.', '', 'Email subject line: under 8 words, no punctuation at the end, intriguing not salesy.', '', 'EMAIL BODY FORMAT — MUST be valid HTML:', 'Use this exact HTML template structure:', '
', '

First paragraph — one specific observation about their business.

', '

Second paragraph — one clear relevant value statement.

', '

Third paragraph — one soft call to action.

', '

Best regards,
Mary Akintunde
Founder, Crystallux
info@crystallux.org | crystallux.org

', '
', '', 'Maximum 120 words in the email body.', 'Three short paragraphs maximum.', 'The HTML must be clean and inline-styled for email clients.', 'Do NOT include the subject line in the HTML body.', '', 'LinkedIn message rules:', 'Sound like a genuine connection request.', 'Reference one specific thing about their work.', 'No pitch in the first message.', 'Under 250 characters.', '', 'WhatsApp message rules:', 'Sound like texting a warm contact.', 'Casual and friendly tone.', 'Under 100 words.', '', 'Follow up message: Use same HTML template as email body. Reference the first outreach naturally, keep it short and human.', '', 'Return ONLY raw JSON with no explanation no markdown no code blocks:', '{', ' "email_subject": "compelling subject line under 8 words",', ' "email_body": "full HTML email body using the template above",', ' "linkedin_message": "genuine connection request under 250 characters",', ' "whatsapp_message": "casual warm message under 100 words",', ' "followup_message": "HTML follow up email using same template",', ' "outreach_angle": "one sentence describing the hook used",', ' "personalization_score": 8', '}' ]; prompt = lines.join('\n'); } return { json: { ...lead, niche_overlay_applied: !!overlay, prompt: prompt } };

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", max_tokens: 2000, messages: [{ role: "user", content: $json.prompt }] }) }}
